content.situation: 学生在图书馆向工作人员致谢后准备离开，想礼貌地结束对话
content.speakerText: Thank you for helping me find the reference books!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你帮我找到参考书！

blanks.answer: You're welcome, have a great day!
options: You're welcome, have a great day!

content.hint: 回应感谢时用 'You're welcome' 开头，结尾用祝福语礼貌结束
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌道别中的回应结构

content.situation: 学生在办公室向行政人员道谢后，准备结束对话并离开
content.speakerText: I really appreciate your time and advice!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你抽出时间给我建议！

options: Don't mention it, I'm busy now.
No worries, I'll call you later.

content.hint: 表达乐意帮忙用 'My pleasure'，结束时用温和的告别语
content.knowledgePoint: 表达乐意帮助与礼貌告别

content.situation: 学生在服务台感谢工作人员后，准备离开并希望对方也过得愉快
content.speakerText: Thanks for answering all my questions!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你回答了我所有的问题！

blanks.answer: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!
options: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!
No need to thank me, I'm off duty.

content.hint: 标准回应是 'You're welcome!' 加上积极的祝福语
content.knowledgePoint: 日常感谢与积极告别语的搭配
